name: Thanksgiving Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Whole wheat bread, crumbled (3 slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and add bread crumbs and tomato juice to make the mixture stiff.
2. If the mixture is too dry, add water as needed.
3. Place in lightly oiled loaf pans.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
5. Serve with a favorite vegetable gravy (optional). After baking, cover with a towel to keep moist or serve it dry if preferred.
